items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 7 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「蚂蚁携手20余家伙伴共建ASL生态,推动智能体可信互联」、「让智能体拥有原生语言,蚂蚁密算WAIC发布HOP 3.0」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: China's new World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization is President Xi's clearest play yet for a parallel AI order
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：At the World AI Conference in Shanghai, Xi Jinping announced 5,000 AI training slots for Global South countries and the launch of the "World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization." Cooperation centers with AS…
items.insightText: 优先找可复用的工程范式、组织实践和系统架构细节，低相关议题可直接跳过。

items.title: Claude make Fable 5 permanent
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Claude make Fable 5 permanent An update from the @claudeai account on Twitter: Beginning July 20, Claude Fable 5 will be included in all Max and Team Premium plans, at 50% of limits. Pro and Team Standard users will con…
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: Just like Deepseek, China's Kimi K3 is forcing Western AI labs to question their compute advantage
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：Moonshot AI has released Kimi K3, a model that by early assessments matches Anthropic's Opus 4.8, built by a team of just 300 people. Even OpenAI strategist Dean W. Ball calls it "very good," but, of course, warns that …
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
